phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Duomo di Como?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel DWOH-moh dee KOH-moh?
phrases.cultural_note: Como's cathedral, begun in 1396, blends Gothic and Renaissance styles and stands at the heart of the old town.

responses.english: On Piazza del Duomo, right here in front.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah del DWOH-moh, PROH-pryoh kwee dah-VAN-tee.
responses.french: In Piazza del Duomo, proprio qui davanti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy silk products
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso comprare prodotti in seta?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-soh kom-PRAH-reh proh-DOT-tee een SEH-tah?
phrases.cultural_note: Como produces around 70% of Europe's finest silk; the city has been a silk-making centre since the 15th century.

responses.english: On Via Vittorio Emanuele, many shops.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah veet-TOH-ryoh eh-man-WEH-leh, noo-meh-ROH-zee NEH-goh-tsee.
responses.french: In Via Vittorio Emanuele, numerosi negozi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the lake from the old town
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si raggiunge il lago dal centro storico?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see raj-JOO-njeh eel LAH-goh dal CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh?

responses.english: Head down to Piazza Cavour, it's very close.
responses.phonetic: SHEN-dah VER-soh lah PYAHT-tsah kah-VOOR, eh vee-chee-NEES-see-moh.
responses.french: Scenda verso la Piazza Cavour, è vicinissimo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat at a traditional trattoria
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è una trattoria tipica qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh OO-nah trat-toh-REE-ah TEE-pee-kah kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: Yes, on Via Cesare Cantù, two steps away.
responses.phonetic: see, een VEE-ah CHEH-zah-reh kan-TOO, ah DOO-eh PAS-see.
responses.french: Sì, in Via Cesare Cantù, a due passi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the city walls are still visible
phrases.text_local: Scusi, si vedono ancora le mura romane?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see VEH-doh-noh an-KOH-rah leh MOO-rah roh-MAH-neh?
phrases.cultural_note: Como was founded as a Roman colony; sections of the original walls are still visible near Porta Vittoria.

responses.english: Yes, near Porta Vittoria, a few steps from here.
responses.phonetic: see, vee-CHEE-noh ah POR-tah veet-TOH-ryah, POH-kee PAS-see dah kwee.
responses.french: Sì, vicino a Porta Vittoria, pochi passi da qui.
